title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: Can you take care of the plants while I'm away?
example.secondSentence: Can you (1) _________ the plants while I'm away?

questions.firstSentence: They haven't finished building the bridge yet.
The box is too heavy for me to carry.
questions.secondSentence: The box isn't (1) _________ for me to carry.

questions.firstSentence: She forced me to sign the document.
He hasn't visited his parents since Christmas.
I'm sure the keys are on the table.
The athlete ran faster than all the others in the race.
